title: Slash String Optimized
description: This is a plugin that upon using /string can give you stacks of string. It is optimized for server memory usage.
body:
# **SLASH STRING OPTIMIZED**
Are you creating a SMP with a server with limited memory? This plugin is perfect for you! This plugin is optimal for low-end servers and is a good plugin overall! It helps people get into PvP faster, removing a major part of grinding. Paper servers remove the string duper functionality, and this plugin can help with that as well!
